titleStmt.title: SII 22.181: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 181. (A.R. No. 181 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, GRĀMAM. ŚIVALŌKANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (II ?)—3rd YEAR.

summary.p: This records the remission of the pāḍikāval taxes due to him from the wet and dry lands (of the village) in favour of the temple of Tiru-Āṟṟuttaḷi-Āluḍaiyār at Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḍiyūr-nāḍu of Tirumuṉaippāḍi a sub-division of Rajarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Mōhan Āḷappiṟandāṉ alias Anapāya-kāḍavarāyaṉ who had the pāḍikāval (police guard) right over the nāḍu. The title of the chief is after the surname of king Kulōttuṅga II (Anapāya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu munṟāvatu rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉaippāṭi muṭiyūr nāṭṭu śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa catu
kalattu Uṭaiyār tiru Āṟṟuttaḷi Āḷuṭaiyārkku Innāṭu pāṭi kāvaluṭaiya mokan Āḷappiṟantāṉāna Aṉapāyakkāṭavarāyanen tiruyāṟṟuttaḷi Āḷuṭaiyār
nilaṅkaḷ nancai puṉcaiyil nāṅkaḷuṭaiya perumpāṭikāval tavirn tom Eṅkaḷukkum Eṅkaḷ vaṅcattārkkumākac camaintu Inṉāyaṉārkkup pāṭi
kāval tavirttuk kuṭutteṉ mokanāḷappiṟantāṉ Aṉapāyakkāṭavarāya nen pāṭikāval koḷvār kaṅkaiiṭai kumariyiṭai ceyitār ceyta pāvaṅ koḷvār vallava[ raiyar sattiyam] .
Digital edition of SII 22.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
